summary: Frontend regression testing after CRM Dashboard refactor (split 2256-line file into /pages/crm/ modules). Verified unauth screen, admin auth, sidebar nav rendering all 6 items, every section renders without blank screen, leads table columns (Plan present, Calls removed), kebab action menu, AddLeadModal selectors, WonPlanModal, LeadDetailModal selectors, Workflow rule form. All required data-testids verified present. Backend smoke endpoints all return 200. No console errors related to module resolution. Refactor regression-safe.
critical_code_review_comments: CRMDashboard.jsx shell is now 199 lines — clean and below the 700-line threshold.
All sub-modules (components/, modals/, sections/) export named components correctly; no circular imports detected.
ESLint passes with 0 issues on /app/frontend/src/pages/crm/ and CRMDashboard.jsx.
Backend smoke OK: /api/crm/auth/me, /api/crm/leads, /api/crm/funnels, /api/crm/workflow-rules, /api/crm/leads/overdue, /api/crm/plans all returned 200 with admin session.

Note: kebab action labels render as 'View details', 'Mark as Won', 'Mark as Lost', 'Delete lead' (matches refactor intent; minor wording difference from review-request shorthand of 'View / Mark Won / Mark Lost / Delete' — functionally equivalent).
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST_-prefixed lead during testing to exercise lead-row/lead-actions-trigger/lead-detail-* selectors; cleaned up after run via DELETE /api/crm/leads/{id}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM refactor verified. Mock login is POST (not GET) to /api/auth/mock-login?user_type=admin. To test lead-level testids (rows/triggers/detail-stage/won-plan), seed a lead first via POST /api/crm/leads — DB starts empty. workflow-add-btn is always rendered but takes ~1s to appear after click on nav-workflow (use wait_for_selector). plan dropdown (lead-plan-*) only appears for Won leads on the leads table row. Overdue banner only appears when overdue leads exist.

data_testid_verification.overdue-banner: Not rendered (no overdue leads in DB — expected)
data_testid_verification.lead-plan-*: Not rendered (only Won leads show plan dropdown — expected)

console_errors_filtered: Only 2 unrelated 401s (likely auth-probe for non-CRM endpoints during dashboard load); no module-resolution errors, no React render errors, no missing-import errors related to the refactor.
